skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    t2.full_name,
    t2.driver_code,
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%M:%S.%f', TIMESTAMP_MILLIS(t1.lap_time_ms)) AS fastest_lap_time
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.public_laps AS t1
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS t2
ON
    t1.driver_id = t2.driver_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS t3
ON
    t1.session_id = t3.session_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS t4
ON
    t3.race_id = t4.race_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons AS t5
ON
    t4.season_id = t5.season_id
WHERE
    t3.session_type = 'Qualifying'
    AND t5.year = 2026
ORDER BY
    t1.lap_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
